meta.title: New York Garden Flower Wholesale, Flushing NY
meta.description: Wholesale cut flowers imported direct from Ecuador, Colombia, Costa Rica, Mexico, Poland & Canada. Serving florists, event planners, restaurants and hotels since 1990.

hero.lede: We import direct and sell direct: no middleman markup, no online cart. Browse what's in today, then call or WhatsApp for the day's price.
hero.plateAlt: A generative botanical specimen, drawn one flower at a time
hero.featureAlt: A single burgundy garden rose against a soft blush ground
hero.featureCaption: Garden rose, from this morning's cooler

catalogue.title: Catalogue
catalogue.lede: A running record of what we regularly carry. Prices move with the market. Ask us today's.

sourcing.title: Sourced, not brokered
sourcing.lede: Imported direct since {{year}}: six growing regions, one cooler.

whoWeSupply.title: Built for the trade
whoWeSupply.lede: From single-stem walk-ins to standing weekly orders, we stock for the people who put flowers in front of people.

florists.title: Florists
florists.body: Standing orders, rush adds, and the odd Saturday-morning save.

events.title: Event & wedding planners
events.body: Volume pricing and advance holds for the dates that can't slip.

hospitality.title: Restaurants & hotels
hospitality.body: Recurring lobby, table, and event stock on a schedule you set.

walkins.title: Walk-ins & small buyers
walkins.body: No order too small to ask. Come by the cooler.

zones.label: Delivery zones
zones.value: New York metropolitan area and nearby Connecticut

pickup.label: Pickup
pickup.value: Available at 171-10 39th Ave, Flushing during business hours

account.title: Open a wholesale account
account.step1: Tell us your business and delivery address
account.step2: We confirm your account and standing terms
account.step3: Start ordering from the daily cooler list

contactPage.title: Contact us
contactPage.lede: Tell us what you're after and we'll send back today's price. We reply fastest on WhatsApp.

form.messagePlaceholder: Flowers, quantities, and the date you need them.
form.invalid: Add your name, a phone number, and a short message so we can help.
form.error: We couldn't email the shop just now. Your WhatsApp draft is ready below, or reach us directly.
form.sentTitle: Your inquiry is on its way.
form.sentBody: We've emailed a copy to the shop and opened WhatsApp so you can send it directly. We'll reply with today's pricing.
form.sentBodyNoEmail: We've opened WhatsApp so you can send your inquiry directly. You can also email a copy to the shop below.
form.emailCopyButton: Email a copy to the shop

footer.rights: © {{year}} New York Garden Flower Wholesale, Inc.
